terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.description: Terms and conditions of use for MeepleAI service

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using MeepleAI, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the service. Use of the service is restricted to users who are at least 16 years of age.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: MeepleAI is an artificial intelligence-based assistant designed to help users understand board game rules. The service includes: processing PDF rulebooks, answering questions about rules via AI, managing a personal game library, and accessing a community-shared catalog.

freemiumModel.title: 3. Freemium Model
freemiumModel.content: MeepleAI offers free basic features and paid premium features. Free features include a limited number of daily queries and catalog access. Premium features include unlimited queries, priority processing, and advanced functionality. Specific details are available on the pricing page.

userAccount.title: 4. User Account
userAccount.content: To use MeepleAI, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for the security of your credentials and all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

userContent.title: 5. User-Uploaded Content
userContent.content:
By uploading PDFs or other content to MeepleAI, you represent and warrant that you have the right to use such content and to grant MeepleAI a limited license to process it in order to provide you with the service. Content is processed exclusively for your personal use and is not shared with other users without your consent.

**Copyright Certification:** By uploading any content, you certify that you own or have obtained the necessary rights, licenses, or permissions to use and share such content. You confirm that your upload does not infringe upon any third party's intellectual property rights.

**Indemnification:** You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless MeepleAI and its operators from and against any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your upload of content that infringes upon any copyright, trademark, or other intellectual property right.

**DMCA Compliance:** MeepleAI respects the intellectual property rights of others. If you believe that any content on MeepleAI infringes upon your copyright, you may submit a takedown notice to: **legal@meepleai.com**. Please include: identification of the copyrighted work, identification of the infringing material, your contact information, and a statement of good faith belief.

aiUsage.title: 6. Use of Artificial Intelligence
aiUsage.content:
Responses provided by MeepleAI's AI are **automatically generated** and always include a reference to the source (page and section of the rulebook). However, the AI **may contain errors** or misinterpretations. We always recommend **verifying responses against the original rulebook**. MeepleAI does not guarantee absolute accuracy of responses and assumes no responsibility for decisions made based solely on AI responses.

**AI Providers:**
- **Ollama** (self-hosted, EU): Handles approximately **80%** of all AI requests. Data stays within our infrastructure.
- **OpenRouter** (USA): Handles approximately **20%** of AI requests when needed. Protected by DPA with Standard Contractual Clauses.

**Consent Versioning:** Your AI consent preferences are versioned. When we make material changes to AI processing or add new providers, you will be notified and asked to review your consent.

**Right to Opt-Out:** You may opt out of AI processing at any time by visiting **/settings/ai-consent**. Opting out will disable all AI-powered features for your account.

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: MeepleAI and all its original content, features, and functionality are owned by MeepleAI and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. Processed game rulebooks remain the property of their respective publishers.

limitations.title: 8. Limitations of Liability
limitations.content: MeepleAI is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free. In no event shall MeepleAI be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.

termination.title: 9. Suspension and Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to the service immediately, without notice, for any violation of these Terms. You may terminate your account at any time from your profile settings. Upon termination, your right to use the service will cease immediately.

modifications.title: 10. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of changes via email or through a notice on the service. Continued use of the service after such modifications constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

governingLaw.title: 11. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms are governed by Italian and European Union laws. For any dispute arising from these Terms, the competent court shall be that of Milan, Italy.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: For questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, you can contact us at: legal@meepleai.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how MeepleAI collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other applicable data protection laws.

dataController.title: 2. Data Controller
dataController.content: The data controller for your personal data is MeepleAI. For any questions regarding the processing of your data, you can contact us at: privacy@meepleai.com

dataCollected.title: 3. Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We collect the following categories of data: Registration data (email, display name, encrypted password); Usage data (AI queries, games in library, preferences); Technical data (IP address, browser type, operating system); Uploaded content (rulebook PDFs for processing). We do not collect sensitive data or data from minors under 16 years of age.

purposes.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
purposes.content: We use your data to: provide you with the MeepleAI service and its features; improve and personalize your experience; communicate with you about service updates and news; ensure security and prevent abuse; comply with legal obligations.

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis
legalBasis.content: The processing of your data is based on: Contract performance (service provision); Consent (for optional marketing communications); Legitimate interest (service improvement, security); Legal obligation (regulatory compliance).

dataSharing.title: 6. Data Sharing
dataSharing.content: We share your data only with: AI service providers for query processing (in anonymized form); hosting and infrastructure providers; competent authorities if required by law. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your data for as long as necessary to provide you with the service. Account data is retained until account deletion. Usage logs are retained for 12 months. Uploaded PDFs are processed and deleted within 30 days of processing.

userRights.title: 8. Your Rights
userRights.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data; rectify inaccurate data; delete your data (right to be forgotten); restrict processing; data portability; object to processing; withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact: privacy@meepleai.com

cookies.title: 9. Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use essential technical cookies for service operation and analytical cookies (with your consent) to improve user experience. You can manage your cookie preferences from your browser settings or the cookie banner.

security.title: 10. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data, including: encryption of data in transit and at rest; strict access controls; continuous security monitoring; regular backups.

transfers.title: 11. International Transfers
transfers.content: Your data may be transferred and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area. In such cases, we ensure that appropriate safeguards are applied, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through a notice on the service. We encourage you to review this page regularly to stay informed.

contact.title: 13. Contact and Complaints
contact.content: For privacy questions or to exercise your rights, contact: privacy@meepleai.com. You also have the right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority if you believe the processing of your data violates GDPR.

aiProcessing.title: 14. How We Use Artificial Intelligence
aiProcessing.content:
MeepleAI uses **artificial intelligence (AI)** to help you understand board game rules. AI features include:

- Answering questions about game rules via chat
- Analyzing uploaded rulebook PDFs
- Providing setup guides and rule clarifications

**What data is processed by AI:**
- Your query text (the question you ask)
- Game context (selected game, relevant rulebook sections)
- Chat history (up to **10 recent messages** for conversation continuity)
- A **pseudonymized identifier** (not your real user ID)

**What is NOT sent to AI providers:**
- Your email address
- Your real name or display name
- Payment information
- Your game library or collection data
- Your account credentials

aiProviders.title: 15. AI Providers
aiProviders.content:
MeepleAI uses a **local-first AI routing strategy** to maximize data protection:

| Provider | Location | Hosting | Traffic Share | Data Control |
|----------|----------|---------|---------------|-------------|
| **Ollama** | EU (self-hosted) | Our infrastructure | ~80% | Fully controlled |
| **OpenRouter** | USA | Third-party | ~20% | DPA with SCCs |

**Routing priority:** All requests are routed to our **self-hosted Ollama instance** (EU) by default. Requests are only sent to OpenRouter when:
- The self-hosted model is unavailable or overloaded
- A specific model capability is required
- The user has explicitly consented to external AI providers

OpenRouter processing is protected by a **Data Processing Agreement (DPA)** with **Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs)** for international data transfers.

aiDataProtection.title: 16. AI Data Protection
aiDataProtection.content:
We implement **4 key measures** to protect your data during AI processing:

- **PII Stripping**: All personally identifiable information (names, emails, addresses) is automatically detected and removed before any data is sent to AI providers
- **Pseudonymization**: Your user identity is replaced with a non-reversible pseudonymized identifier in all AI request logs
- **TLS 1.3 Encryption**: All data in transit to AI providers is encrypted using TLS 1.3
- **Data Minimization**: Only the minimum data necessary to generate a response is sent to AI providers — no library data, no account details, no browsing history

aiRetention.title: 17. AI Data Retention
aiRetention.content:
AI-related data is retained for limited periods and automatically deleted:

| Data Type | Retention Period | Purpose | Contains Personal Data |
|-----------|-----------------|---------|----------------------|
| AI request logs | **30 days** | Service monitoring & debugging | Pseudonymized only |
| Conversation memories | **90 days** | Conversation context continuity | Pseudonymized only |
| Aggregated usage stats | **1 year** | Service improvement analytics | **No** — fully anonymous |

All retention periods are enforced by **automated deletion jobs**. After the retention period expires, data is permanently and irreversibly deleted. Pseudonymization of request logs occurs automatically **after 7 days**.

aiRights.title: 18. Your Rights for AI Data
aiRights.content:
You have full control over how your data is used with AI features.

**Consent Management** — Visit **/settings/ai-consent** to:
- Enable or disable AI processing entirely
- Consent to or revoke consent for external AI providers (OpenRouter)
- Withdraw consent at any time — changes take effect immediately

**Opt-Out** — If you opt out of AI processing:
- All AI-powered features (chat, rule Q&A, setup guides) will be disabled for your account
- No new data will be sent to any AI provider
- Existing AI data will be deleted according to the retention schedule above

**Right to Erasure (Art. 17 GDPR)** — You can request deletion of all your AI-related data:
- **Self-service**: Go to **Settings > Usage** and use the AI data deletion tool
- **By request**: Contact privacy@meepleai.com
- Deletion is completed within **72 hours** of your request

**Right to Access (Art. 15 GDPR)** — You can request a copy of all AI-related data we hold about you by contacting privacy@meepleai.com. We will respond within 30 days.

aiLegalBasis.title: 19. Legal Basis for AI Processing
aiLegalBasis.content:
The legal basis for AI data processing depends on the type of processing:

| Processing Type | Legal Basis | GDPR Article |
|----------------|-------------|-------------|
| **Self-hosted AI** (Ollama) | Legitimate interest | Art. 6(1)(f) |
| **External AI** (OpenRouter) | Explicit consent | Art. 6(1)(a) |
| **Usage analytics** | Legitimate interest (pseudonymized) | Art. 6(1)(f) |

**Self-hosted AI (Ollama):** Processing is based on our legitimate interest in providing the core service functionality. Data never leaves our EU infrastructure.

**External AI (OpenRouter):** Processing requires your **explicit consent**, which you can grant or withdraw at any time via /settings/ai-consent.

**International Transfers:** When data is processed by OpenRouter (USA), transfers are protected by:
- **Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs)** per Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR
- **Technical measures**: PII stripping, pseudonymization, TLS 1.3 encryption
- **Organizational measures**: Data Processing Agreement, access controls, audit rights

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: How we use cookies and similar technologies

whatAreCookies.title: 1. What are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember your preferences and improve user experience.

typesOfCookies.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
typesOfCookies.content: We use three types of cookies: Technical cookies (essential for service operation), Analytical cookies (to understand how you use the site), Functional cookies (to remember your preferences such as language and theme).

technicalCookies.title: 3. Technical Cookies
technicalCookies.content: These cookies are essential for proper operation: session cookies (authentication), security cookies (CSRF protection), load balancing cookies. They cannot be disabled.

analyticalCookies.title: 4. Analytical Cookies
analyticalCookies.content: With your consent, we use anonymized analytical cookies to: understand which pages are most visited, identify navigation issues, improve service performance. We do not share this data with third parties.

functionalCookies.title: 5. Functional Cookies
functionalCookies.content: These cookies remember your preferences: language (Italian/English), theme (light/dark), view preferences (lists, filters). They make your experience more personalized.

thirdPartyCookies.title: 6. Third-Party Cookies
thirdPartyCookies.content: We may use third-party services that install their own cookies: Cloudflare (security and performance), authentication providers (if you use social login). These services have their own privacy policies.

cookieManagement.title: 7. Managing Cookies
cookieManagement.content: You can manage cookies in several ways: via our cookie banner on first visit, via your browser settings (instructions on aboutcookies.org), by deleting cookies already stored. Note that disabling technical cookies may affect service operation.

cookieDuration.title: 8. Cookie Duration
cookieDuration.content: Technical cookies: session duration. Preference cookies: 1 year. Analytical cookies: 13 months maximum. Authentication cookies: until logout or token expiration.

policyUpdates.title: 9. Policy Updates
policyUpdates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy periodically. Changes will be communicated through the cookie banner or on this page. Last update: March 2026.

essential.label: Essential cookies
essential.description: Required for the site to function (session, core preferences). They cannot be disabled.

analytics.label: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how you use the site, in aggregated and anonymous form.

functional.label: Functional cookies
functional.description: Improve your experience by remembering your choices (theme, language).

about.title: About MeepleAI
about.description: Discover who we are and our mission to improve your gaming experience

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: MeepleAI was born from the passion for board games and the desire to make rules more accessible. We believe that understanding rules shouldn't be a barrier to fun.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: It all started from a simple problem: finding a specific rule in a 50-page rulebook during a gaming session. From that frustration came the idea of an intelligent assistant that knows the rules better than you do.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Making rules understandable for everyone, from beginners to experts

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Answers based directly on official rulebooks, with cited sources

community.title: Community
community.description: Building a community of players who share knowledge and passion

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Using AI to solve real problems in board gaming

team.title: The Team
team.content: We are a small team of board game enthusiasts and developers, united by the passion to make gaming sessions more fluid and enjoyable.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to stop arguing about rules

step1.title: 1. Choose Your Game
step1.description: Select a game from our catalog or upload your own rulebook PDF. We support hundreds of popular games.

step2.title: 2. Ask a Question
step2.description: Write your question in natural language: 'Can I move two characters on the same turn?', 'How does scoring work at the end?'

step3.title: 3. Get the Answer
step3.description: Receive a precise answer with direct references to the rulebook. You can always verify the source of the response.

rag.title: Intelligent RAG
rag.description: Our Retrieval-Augmented Generation system finds the most relevant sections in the rulebook to answer your question.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Ask questions in Italian or English, regardless of the rulebook language.

pdfUpload.title: PDF Upload
pdfUpload.description: Upload your game rulebook and our AI will analyze it to answer your questions.

gameLibrary.title: Personal Library
gameLibrary.description: Save your games and access them quickly. Track your collection and preferences.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: News, guides, and insights on the world of board games

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.content: We're working on interesting content for you. In the meantime, follow us on social media for the latest updates!

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Do you have questions, suggestions, or feedback? We're here to help

q1.question: How do I create a MeepleAI account?
q1.short: During the private alpha, sign in via the email invite or join the waitlist on /join.
q1.long:
During the **private alpha** (running through Q2 2026), MeepleAI is invite-only.

There are two ways:

1. **Direct invites**: if you know an alpha member, they can share an `/accept-invite/{token}` link. Each user has 5 invites.
2. **Waitlist**: register on `/join` indicating your favourite game. We send out new invites weekly based on your position.

After the public go-live (post-alpha), registration will open for everyone.

q2.question: I forgot my password — how do I reset it?
q2.short: Go to /login and click "Forgot password?". You'll receive a reset link by email within 5 minutes.
q2.long:
From the `/login` page click **"Forgot password?"**. Enter your registered email.

Within 5 minutes you will receive an email with a reset link (valid 1 hour). If you don't see the email, check **spam/promotions**.

If the issue persists, contact us via `/contact`.

q3.question: Can I change my email address?
q3.short: Yes, from Settings → Account → Email. You'll receive a verification at the new address before the change is applied.
q3.long:
Go to **Settings → Account → Email**. Enter the new address and your current password.

We will send a **verification link to the new address**: the change becomes effective only after confirmation.

q4.question: How do I install a toolkit for a game?
q4.short: Open the game from the catalog → Toolkit tab → click "Install" on the desired toolkit. It activates within 30 seconds.
q4.long:
To **install a toolkit**:

1. Go to the **Game Catalog** (`/games`)
2. Open the desired game (e.g., Wingspan)
3. **Toolkit** tab → choose a toolkit (Official or Community)
4. Click **"Install"**

The toolkit activates within 30 seconds. You will find it under **"My toolkits"** in the side panel of the game. To uninstall, right-click → Remove.

q5.question: Can I add a game that is not in the catalog?
q5.short: During the alpha only admins can add games. Suggest new games via /contact.
q5.long:
During the **private alpha**, adding new games to the catalog is restricted to admins to ensure KB quality.

You can **suggest a game** via `/contact`: send title, publisher, year, and a link to a reference game database. We review requests weekly. Post-alpha, users will be able to propose games self-service with moderated approval.

q6.question: How does my personal library work?
q6.short: The library tracks the games you own or follow. Add games from the catalog with the "Owned" button.
q6.long:
The **Library** (`/library`) tracks the games you own or want to follow.

From the catalog, click **"Owned"** to add it, **"Wishlist"** to follow it. From the library you can:

- View statistics about your matches
- Quickly access toolkits and KBs
- Receive notifications about new community content

q7.question: How do MeepleAI's AI agents work?
q7.short: Each agent specializes in a single game. It answers questions about rules, strategy and setup citing the official KB.
q7.long:
**AI agents** are specialized per game. Each agent:

- Uses an **indexed KB** (rulebooks, official FAQ, errata)
- Always cites the source (manual page or URL)
- Supports **multiple models**: Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o, Gemini Pro

Open an agent from a game page → **Agents** tab → "Try". The conversation is private by default; you can share it post-fact via link.

q8.question: Are my AI conversations private?
q8.short: Yes. Chats are private by default. You can share them via a public link if you choose to help the community.
q8.long:
**Yes, your conversations are private** by default and are not used for training.

You may optionally **make a conversation public** (toggle "Share") to help other players. Only chats marked public are visible in the `/shared-chats` catalog.

q9.question: Can I choose which AI model to use?
q9.short: Yes. Each agent exposes the supported models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini). Switch from the chat menu at the top.
q9.long:
Yes. Each agent declares the **supported models**. From the chat menu (top right during a conversation) you can switch between:

- **Claude Sonnet** (default, top quality)
- **GPT-4o** (fast, cheap)
- **Gemini Pro** (long-context for large rulebooks)

During the alpha all models are **free** with a 100 msg/day limit.

q10.question: What data does MeepleAI collect?
q10.short: Email, nickname, gameplay activity and AI conversations. No payment data during alpha. Details on /privacy.
q10.long:
We collect:

- **Account**: email, nickname, password (bcrypt hash)
- **Gameplay**: owned games, sessions, statistics
- **AI**: conversations with agents (private by default)

We do not collect **payment data** during the alpha (free). Data is hosted on EU servers (Frankfurt).

Full policy: `/privacy`.

q11.question: Can I export my data?
q11.short: Yes. From Settings → Privacy → Export data. You receive a .zip with JSON and markdown within 24h.
q11.long:
Yes, in compliance with **GDPR Art. 20**.

From **Settings → Privacy → Export my data**, request an export. Within 24h you'll receive a `.zip` containing:

- `account.json` — profile and settings
- `library.json` — owned games, statistics
- `conversations/*.md` — all chats in markdown

The export is available for download for 7 days.

q12.question: How do I delete my account?
q12.short: From Settings → Account → Delete account. Deletion is final after a 30-day grace period.
q12.long:
From **Settings → Account → Delete account**.

After the request you have a **30-day grace period** to reconsider (just log in). After that, **all your data is permanently deleted**: account, conversations and public contributions (toolkits/agents) get anonymized.

q13.question: Is MeepleAI free?
q13.short: During the alpha yes, fully free. Post-alpha we'll have a free tier and a paid Pro plan.
q13.long:
During the **private alpha** MeepleAI is **fully free** for invited members.

Post-alpha (Q2 2026 estimated) we will offer:

- **Free tier**: public catalog, 50 AI msg/day, 1 toolkit installed
- **Pro** (~ €5/month): unlimited AI, unlimited toolkits, private agents, priority support

Alpha members will receive **3 months Pro free** as a thank-you.

q14.question: How long will the alpha last?
q14.short: The alpha started Jan 2026. We estimate public go-live in Q2 2026 (Apr–Jun).
q14.long:
The **private alpha** started in **January 2026** with the first 100 invites.

We estimate public go-live for **Q2 2026** (April–June), depending on:

- Infrastructure stability
- Game catalog (target 100+ indexed games)
- Alpha members feedback

Regular updates on our changelog `/changelog`.
